headline: Oil Stocks Are Hot. Here Are 9 Worth Getting To Know.
summary: Oil and gas stocks have been big winners amid the Iran war and the jump in oil prices, though there are laggards too.  Breaking the energy sector into its constituent oil and gas industry groups helps pinpoint the leaders.  IBD tracks a total of 241 oil and gas industry stocks sorted into 10 separate industry groups.

raw.headline: Oil Stocks Are Hot. Here Are 9 Worth Getting To Know.

Breaking the energy sector into its constituent oil and gas industry groups helps pinpoint the leaders.  IBD tracks a total of 241 oil and gas industry stocks sorted into 10 separate industry groups.

headline: Greenland oil drilling will be 'solution' for US, European energy security
summary: Greenland Energy Company (GLND) went public and began trading on the Nasdaq via an IPO on Tuesday, as the company seeks to start a massive onshore oil drilling operation in Greenland by the end of this year.Greenland Energy CEO Robert Price sits down with Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley to talk about the company's drilling timeline and the opportunity this will be present for US and European buyers.

raw.headline: Greenland oil drilling will be 'solution' for US, European energy security

headline: Not all oil stocks will benefit from Middle East conflict, JPMorgan says

headline: Treasury yields rise as Trump reiterates Iran infrastructure threat, sending oil higher
